name: ai-assistant-sheet
title: AI Assistant Sheet
description: Responsive assistant panel — side sheet on desktop, bottom sheet on mobile — with a guarded close path.

props.name: title
props.description: Accessible title. Stays as a hidden label when `header` replaces the visual block.

props.name: header
props.description: Replaces the default title block — typically ai-chat-header.

props.name: context
props.description: Visible context strip under the header.

props.name: composer
props.description: Pinned to the bottom of the sheet, above the safe-area inset.

props.name: onRequestClose
props.description: Called before every dismissal — close button, overlay click, Escape. Return false to keep the sheet open.

clinicalNotes: Closing must not discard a drafted prompt, an active recording, or an unreviewed answer. A sheet is dismissible three ways — close button, overlay click, Escape — and the last two are easy to hit by accident mid-consultation, so every path is routed through `onRequestClose` and the caller decides whether the work can be dropped. Focus is trapped while open and returns to the trigger on close, which is what keeps the assistant a side task rather than a place a keyboard user gets stranded. On phones it is a bottom sheet with a safe-area-aware composer, so the send button is not under the home indicator.
notes: Radix Dialog requires a title; when `header` is supplied the title is kept as an sr-only element.
